calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2012 Continued To Jan-09-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff'S Motion For Declaratory Relief And For A Stay Of Proceedings
Off Calendar Aug-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Geoffrey T. Sawyer, Esq. of Weil & Drage, Tel. 949.837.8200, for Plaintiff and moving party;
William J. Peters, Esq. of Gordon & Rees, Tel. 415.875.3143, for Defendant and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. The court adopted the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF AND FOR A STAY OF PROCEEDINGS is Denied. The Consultant Contract incorporated the arbitration clause in the Prime Agreement and applies to Plaintiff. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
